what_was_done: Fixed 3 inline gaps: empty CATALOG_CONTEXT, CORS single-origin, missing response_mime_type
Switched AI provider from Gemini Vision to NVIDIA NIM (minimax/minimax-m3)
Edge function: OpenAI-compatible endpoint, base64 photo inline delivery, JSON fence stripping
ROADMAP.md and STATE.md updated — Phase 05 marked complete
session_summary.last_commit_message: feat(style-match): ganti Gemini ke NVIDIA NIM minimax/minimax-m3

pending_human_actions.action: Apply supabase/migrations/005_style_sessions.sql in Supabase Dashboard → SQL Editor
pending_human_actions.why: ai_style_sessions table does not exist in production until this migration is applied; Style Match session persistence will fail with 42P01 error

pending_human_actions.action: Set NVIDIA_API_KEY in Netlify Environment Variables (Site settings → Environment variables)
pending_human_actions.why: Without this secret, style-match Edge Function falls back to mock response — AI call never reaches NVIDIA NIM
pending_human_actions.replaces: GEMINI_API_KEY (no longer used — can be removed)

next_phase.name: Cart + Checkout
next_phase.goal: A visitor — guest or authenticated — can add products to the cart, review and adjust the order, complete a multi-step checkout, and receive an order confirmation with a persisted order record
next_phase.plans_status: TBD — run /gsd-plan-phase 6 to generate plans before executing
key_complexity: Guest-to-auth cart merge (localStorage → Supabase on login)
Order creation state machine with price snapshot
Multi-step checkout flow (Shipping → Review → Payment placeholder → Confirmation)
